response: {"commands":[{"command_template":"bcl2fastq {illumina_hiseq_options}","description":"Standard Illumina HiSeq demultiplexing of raw BCL files into FASTQ reads","required_inputs":["BCL files","sample sheet"],"outputs":["FASTQ files"],"parameters":{}},{"command_template":"custom_demux_script.py --input {fastq} --barcodes {barcode_file} --umi-to-header","description":"Custom inline barcode demultiplexing that also appends the random-mer (UMI) to the read name for later use","required_inputs":["FASTQ files (from HiSeq demultiplexing)","inline barcode list/file"],"outputs":["Demultiplexed FASTQ reads with random-mer (UMI) appended to read names"],"parameters":{"--input":"{fastq}","--barcodes":"{barcode_file}","--umi-to-header":"appends UMI/random-mer to read name"}}]}
